item.title: A metal heart beating
item.description: In this video I show you how to make a gallium beating heart. I show you the reaction that happens when you add gallium to sulfuric acid and then touch iron to the beaded up gallium. It causes a pulsing action due to the surface of the gallium reacting with the sulfuric acid and then reversing once it touches the iron.

media:content.media:title: A metal heart beating
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to make a gallium beating heart. I show you the reaction that happens when you add gallium to sulfuric acid and then touch iron to the beaded up gallium. It causes a pulsing action due to the surface of the gallium reacting with the sulfuric acid and then reversing once it touches the iron.

item.title: Drops of water climbing stairs
item.description: I show you how to use the Leidenfrost effect to make water climb uphill

item.title: Supersaturated crystal experiment
item.description: I show you sodium acetate crystals Growing

item.title: Upside-down pendulum experiment
item.description: In this video I show you how an inverted pendulum works. The physics behind the gravity defying pendulums requires complex equations, but has a simple explanation.

media:content.media:title: Upside-down pendulum experiment
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how an inverted pendulum works. The physics behind the gravity defying pendulums requires complex equations, but has a simple explanation.

item.title: Don't crush tannerite in a hydraulic press ​
item.description: I put Tannerite in a hydraulic press to see if it explodes

media:content.media:title: Don't crush tannerite in a hydraulic press ​
media:content.media:description: I put Tannerite in a hydraulic press to see if it explodes

item.title: What happens when NeverWet meets water?
item.description: In this video I test what happens when you spray a superhydrophobic substance like Neverwet on water. Will it make water become waterproof? Then I show you how you have actually seen waterproof water..In fact you are made of waterproof water!

media:content.media:title: What happens when NeverWet meets water?
media:content.media:description: In this video I test what happens when you spray a superhydrophobic substance like Neverwet on water. Will it make water become waterproof? Then I show you how you have actually seen waterproof water..In fact you are made of waterproof water!

item.title: Coke clouds are sweet
item.description: Placing Coca-Cola in a humidifier creates a "Coke cloud" that tastes sweet

media:content.media:title: Coke clouds are sweet
media:content.media:description: Placing Coca-Cola in a humidifier creates a "Coke cloud" that tastes sweet

item.title: The bone crusher
item.description: Exploring pressure and physics in a simple science demonstration.

media:content.media:title: The bone crusher
media:content.media:description: Exploring pressure and physics in a simple science demonstration.

item.title: Inside the world's blackest room
item.description: Inside the world's blackest room, depth perception is impossible, making it feel like an empty, two-dimensional void or floating in space.

media:content.media:title: Inside the world's blackest room
media:content.media:description: Inside the world's blackest room, depth perception is impossible, making it feel like an empty, two-dimensional void or floating in space.
